references.source: Medscape eMedicine, "Forensic Autopsy of Blunt Force Trauma" (https://emedicine.medscape.com/article/1680107-overview, verified 2026-05); NCBI Bookshelf NBK448153 "Blunt Force Trauma".

中华人民共和国高等教育法 (1998), 第四十条 — verbatim: 「高等学校的校长，由符合教育法规定的任职条件的公民担任。高等学校的校长、副校长按照国家有关规定任免。」 Source: National People's Congress (npc.gov.cn) full law text, verified 2026-05. Cadre management authority is established by the CCP Central Committee's 1990 《党政领导干部选拔任用工作条例》 (later versions in 2002, 2014, 2019).

Andre F, Slimane K, Bachelot T, Dunant A, Namer M et al. "Breast cancer with synchronous metastases: trends in survival during a 14-year period" J Clin Oncol 22(16):3302-3308 (2004 Aug 15), PubMed PMID 15310773 — verified 2026-05. (Note: an earlier auto-research draft cited a 2011 Bhoo-Pathy paper that could not be verified on PubMed and has been removed.)

pmidChecks.actualTitle: Breast cancer with synchronous metastases: trends in survival during a 14-year period.
